channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous potholes, 29th March
item.description:
Dangerous potholes, same position as about 1 year ago, clearly the repair job was not done properly, large dangerous holes now again creating a hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Oakleigh Park North, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The high pavement outside the closed Turkish club. It is pushing up the tar and concrete so much that Wheelchairs/mobility scooter/prams cannot go over it.Also it is a nightmare for blind/poorly sighted as it is so high and cracked also pedestrians.please expedite - otherwise a. Nasty accident could happen especially for the old and infirm.t, 29th March
item.description:
H The high pavement outside the closed Turkish club. It is pushing up the tar and concrete so much that Wheelchairs/mobility scooter/prams cannot go over it.Also it is a nightmare for blind/poorly sighted as it is so high and cracked also pedestrians.please expedite - otherwise a. Nasty accident could happen especially for the old and infirm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensleigh Gardens, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree cracked right the way through, 29th March
item.description:
Large tree behind the tennis courts at the edge of the wood area The tree is split the full length and creaking and making cracking noises
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewis Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Constant rubbish being dumped around the caravan.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edge Hill, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped shopping Trolley, 29th March
item.description:
A shopping trolley has been abandoned at this location. It is unbranded and cannot be attributed to a specific store.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 183, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin., 29th March
item.description:
Rubbish and dog poo bags being Dropped in the ground below bun which is over full.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Dumped household items near bins
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Walk, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Mattress and Bed Dumped on Pavement, 29th March
item.description:
A large unwanted mattress and bed have been left dumped on the pavement outside number 69. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of Rubbish Dumped in Middle of Pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Two large bags of rubbish have been left dumped in the middle of the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bags of Rubbish and Textiles Dumped on Pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Multiple bags of rubbish and textiles have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead

item.title: Large Roll of Plastic Sheeting Dumped on Pavement, 29th March
item.description:
A large roll of plastic sheeting has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of Rubbish Dumped in Front of Electricity Sub-Station, 29th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish has once again been left dumped in front of the electricity sub-station. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Sofa Chair Dumped on Pavement, 29th March
item.description:
A large unwanted sofa chair has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 127. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead

item.title: Unwanted Mattresses Dumped on Public Bench, 29th March
item.description:
Two unwanted mattresses have been left dumped on the public bench. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orissa Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic Rubbish Dumped by Turfed Area, 29th March
item.description:
A large amount of domestic rubbish has been left dumped on the turfed area behind the communal bins. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Chain and Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 29th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead

item.description:

item.title: Rubbish Strewn on Path, 29th March
item.description:
Domestic rubbish is strewn on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tewson Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Safety Bollard, 29th March
item.description:
The safety bollard has been broken and left dumped by the wall. Can it please be replaced. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tewson Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Child Car Seats Dumped on Wheelie-Bin, 29th March
item.description:
Two unwanted child car seats have been left dumped on top of the wheelie-bins outside number 152. Can the local team please dispose of them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
